home.name: Omar Anwar
home.headline: Front-End Developer & UX Enthusiast
home.description: I build modern, responsive web experiences using Angular, React, and best design practices.

about.title: About Me
about.intro: I am a passionate front-end developer with over a year and a half of experience in developing modern web applications using Angular and React. I have expertise in building interactive, responsive user interfaces with a focus on performance, code quality, and user experience. I am always striving to transform business requirements into effective technical solutions that combine professional design and programming efficiency.
about.dialogBody: You can review or download my latest curriculum vitae to learn more about my experience and skill set.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Technologies I Use
skills.description: A curated set of tools and frameworks I use to deliver professional front-end applications.

projects.label: Featured Projects
projects.title: Portfolio Highlights
projects.description: Explore professional work examples built with modern web technologies and responsive design.

gameReviews.title: Game Reviews Platform
gameReviews.description: Modern gaming discovery platform with responsive UI, categories, reviews, dark mode, and smooth user experience.

freshCart.title: FreshCart E-Commerce
freshCart.description: Full modern ecommerce app with authentication, products, cart system, dark mode, and responsive shopping experience.

taskManager.title: Task Management App
taskManager.description: Clean productivity app for managing daily tasks with a polished UI and optimized workflow.

weatherApp.title: Weather App
weatherApp.description: A modern weather application built with Angular that shows real-time weather and 7-day forecast using Weather API with dark mode support.

appStore.title: App Store Platform
appStore.description: Digital app store interface with responsive browsing, category cards, and polished user experience.

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.description: Let’s work together on your next web project. Send a message or connect through LinkedIn.
